name: stack-golem
description: Personal notom-stack ops & debug toolbox — Scaleway resource control, platform observability (logs/metrics/health on staging+prod), local dev debugging, and Insomnia collection sync. Investigate-first, CLI-driven, never punts to the console.

interface.shortDescription: Personal notom-stack ops & debug toolbox — Scaleway resource control, platform observability (logs/metrics/health on staging+prod), local dev debugging, and Insomnia collection sync. Investigate-first, CLI-driven, never punts to the console.
interface.longDescription: Personal notom-stack ops and debug toolbox for the notom platform: Scaleway resource control, staging and production observability, local development debugging, and Insomnia collection sync. It is built for investigate-first workflows that use CLI and repository context instead of punting to consoles or manual dashboards.
defaultPrompt: Use stack-golem for operations, observability, and local dev debugging on the notom platform.
